examples:
Command Example
!bigfix-deploy-patch site_name="BES Support" computer_ids="3385267" fixlet_id="1759" action_id="Action2"
Context Example
Human Readable Output
7. Get a patch by fixlet ID
Retrieves a patch (fixlet) by ID.
Base Command
bigfix-get-patch

!bigfix-deploy-patch site_name="BES Support" computer_ids="3385267" fixlet_id="1759" action_id="Action2"
Context Example
Human Readable Output
7. Get a patch by fixlet ID
Retrieves a patch (fixlet) by ID.
Base Command
bigfix-get-patch
Input
name: bigfix-get-patch

outputs.description: Link (URL) to the patch Bigfix.Patch.Description Description
outputs.name: Bigfix.Patch.Resource

outputs.description: Relevance of the patch requested Bigfix.Patch.Category Category of the patch requested
outputs.name: Bigfix.Patch.Relevance

outputs.description: Download size Bigfix.Patch.Source Source from where the patch is coming from
outputs.name: Bigfix.Patch.DownloadSize

outputs.description: Source ID of the patch requested Bigfix.Patch.SourceSeverity Source severity of the patch requested
outputs.name: Bigfix.Patch.SourceID

outputs.description: Source release date of the patch requested Bigfix.Patch.ActionID Action ID of the patch requested
outputs.name: Bigfix.Patch.SourceReleaseDate

outputs.description: Action script of the patch requested
outputs.name: Bigfix.Patch.ActionScript
